attributes.description: AWS RDS dashboard for CloudWatch metrics collected by the OpenTelemetry Collector.
attributes.title: [AWS OTel] RDS

embeddableConfig.description:
Monitor AWS RDS database instances across your fleet in real time.
Filter by DB instance at the top. Spot saturated CPU, idle databases, and storage outliers in the summary table — click any database to drill down.
To get started, instrument your RDS instances with the AWS integration.

embeddableConfig.title: Database count over time
embeddableConfig.description: Number of RDS instances reporting metrics over time, broken down by health (total / saturated / low_storage / idle / healthy). An instance is classified by the worst signal it reported in that bucket: CPU > 80% is saturated, else FreeStorageSpace < 5 GiB is low_storage, else zero or missing DatabaseConnections is idle, else healthy.

attributes.title: Database count over time
attributes.description: Number of RDS instances reporting metrics over time, broken down by health (total / saturated / low_storage / idle / healthy). An instance is classified by the worst signal it reported in that bucket: CPU > 80% is saturated, else FreeStorageSpace < 5 GiB is low_storage, else zero or missing DatabaseConnections is idle, else healthy.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(DBInstanceIdentifier)) > 0 | WHERE stat IN ("Average", "Maximum") | STATS b_cpu = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization`, NULL)), b_storage = MIN(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeStorageSpace`, NULL)), b_conn = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/DatabaseConnections`, NULL)) BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), DBInstanceIdentifier, cloud.region | EVAL state = CASE( b_cpu > 80, "saturated", b_storage < 5368709120, "low_storage", b_conn == 0 OR b_conn IS NULL, "idle", "healthy") | STATS total = COUNT(*), saturated = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "saturated", low_storage = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "low_storage", healthy = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "healthy", idle = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "idle" BY timestamp | SORT timestamp ASC

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(DBInstanceIdentifier)) > 0 | WHERE stat IN ("Average", "Maximum") | STATS b_cpu = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization`, NULL)), b_storage = MIN(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeStorageSpace`, NULL)), b_conn = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/DatabaseConnections`, NULL)) BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), DBInstanceIdentifier, cloud.region | EVAL state = CASE( b_cpu > 80, "saturated", b_storage < 5368709120, "low_storage", b_conn == 0 OR b_conn IS NULL, "idle", "healthy") | STATS total = COUNT(*), saturated = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "saturated", low_storage = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "low_storage", healthy = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "healthy", idle = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "idle" BY timestamp | SORT timestamp ASC

embeddableConfig.title: Databases
embeddableConfig.description: Per-database metrics aggregated over the selected time range. State column is badge-colored (saturated / low-storage / idle / healthy). Units are formatted per column: CPU as percent, free memory/storage as bytes, connections as peak count, Read/Write IOPS as average operations per second, and Read/Write latency as average milliseconds. Click a DB instance cell for the action menu: filter the dashboard, open Performance Insights, or open the RDS console.

attributes.title: Databases
attributes.description: Per-database metrics aggregated over the selected time range. State column is badge-colored (saturated / low-storage / idle / healthy). Units are formatted per column: CPU as percent, free memory/storage as bytes, connections as peak count, Read/Write IOPS as average operations per second, and Read/Write latency as average milliseconds. Click a DB instance cell for the action menu: filter the dashboard, open Performance Insights, or open the RDS console.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(DBInstanceIdentifier)) > 0 | WHERE stat IN ("Average", "Maximum") | STATS c_cpu_max = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization`, NULL)), c_conn_max = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/DatabaseConnections`, NULL)), c_storage_min = MIN(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeStorageSpace`, NULL)), c_cpu = AVG(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization`, NULL)) / 100.0, c_conn = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/DatabaseConnections`, NULL)), c_mem = AVG(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeableMemory`, NULL)), c_storage = AVG(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeStorageSpace`, NULL)), c_read_iops = AVG(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/ReadIOPS`, NULL)), c_write_iops = AVG(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/WriteIOPS`, NULL)), c_read_lat = AVG(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/ReadLatency`, NULL)) * 1000, c_write_lat = AVG(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/WriteLatency`, NULL)) * 1000, c_region = MAX(cloud.region) BY DBInstanceIdentifier, cloud.region | EVAL c_state_sort = CASE( c_cpu_max > 80, 1, c_storage_min < 5368709120, 2, c_conn_max == 0 OR c_conn_max IS NULL, 3, 4), c_state = CASE( c_cpu_max > 80, "saturated", c_storage_min < 5368709120, "low-storage", c_conn_max == 0 OR c_conn_max IS NULL, "idle", "healthy") | SORT c_state_sort ASC

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(DBInstanceIdentifier)) > 0 | WHERE stat IN ("Average", "Maximum") | STATS c_cpu_max = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization`, NULL)), c_conn_max = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/DatabaseConnections`, NULL)), c_storage_min = MIN(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeStorageSpace`, NULL)), c_cpu = AVG(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization`, NULL)) / 100.0, c_conn = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/DatabaseConnections`, NULL)), c_mem = AVG(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeableMemory`, NULL)), c_storage = AVG(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeStorageSpace`, NULL)), c_read_iops = AVG(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/ReadIOPS`, NULL)), c_write_iops = AVG(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/WriteIOPS`, NULL)), c_read_lat = AVG(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/ReadLatency`, NULL)) * 1000, c_write_lat = AVG(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/WriteLatency`, NULL)) * 1000, c_region = MAX(cloud.region) BY DBInstanceIdentifier, cloud.region | EVAL c_state_sort = CASE( c_cpu_max > 80, 1, c_storage_min < 5368709120, 2, c_conn_max == 0 OR c_conn_max IS NULL, 3, 4), c_state = CASE( c_cpu_max > 80, "saturated", c_storage_min < 5368709120, "low-storage", c_conn_max == 0 OR c_conn_max IS NULL, "idle", "healthy") | SORT c_state_sort ASC

attributes.title: Databases by status
attributes.description: Share of databases by health state (saturated / low-storage / idle / healthy) over the selected time range.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(DBInstanceIdentifier)) > 0 | WHERE stat IN ("Average", "Maximum") | STATS f_cpu = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization`, NULL)), f_conn = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/DatabaseConnections`, NULL)), f_storage = MIN(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeStorageSpace`, NULL)) BY DBInstanceIdentifier, cloud.region | EVAL rds_state = CASE( f_cpu > 80, "saturated", f_storage < 5368709120, "low-storage", f_conn == 0 OR f_conn IS NULL, "idle", "healthy") | STATS databases = COUNT(*) BY rds_state

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(DBInstanceIdentifier)) > 0 | WHERE stat IN ("Average", "Maximum") | STATS f_cpu = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization`, NULL)), f_conn = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/DatabaseConnections`, NULL)), f_storage = MIN(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeStorageSpace`, NULL)) BY DBInstanceIdentifier, cloud.region | EVAL rds_state = CASE( f_cpu > 80, "saturated", f_storage < 5368709120, "low-storage", f_conn == 0 OR f_conn IS NULL, "idle", "healthy") | STATS databases = COUNT(*) BY rds_state

embeddableConfig.description: Distinct RDS DB instance identifiers seen in `metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default` over the selected time range.

attributes.description: Distinct RDS DB instance identifiers seen in `metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default` over the selected time range.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(DBInstanceIdentifier)) > 0 | STATS total = COUNT_DISTINCT(CONCAT(TO_STRING(cloud.region), "/", TO_STRING(DBInstanceIdentifier)))

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(DBInstanceIdentifier)) > 0 | STATS total = COUNT_DISTINCT(CONCAT(TO_STRING(cloud.region), "/", TO_STRING(DBInstanceIdentifier)))

embeddableConfig.description: Databases whose peak `CPUUtilization.max` exceeded 80% in the selected time range.

attributes.description: Databases whose peak `CPUUtilization.max` exceeded 80% in the selected time range.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(DBInstanceIdentifier)) > 0 | WHERE stat == "Maximum" | STATS f_cpu = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization`, NULL)) BY DBInstanceIdentifier, cloud.region | STATS saturated = COUNT(*) WHERE f_cpu > 80| KEEP saturated

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(DBInstanceIdentifier)) > 0 | WHERE stat == "Maximum" | STATS f_cpu = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization`, NULL)) BY DBInstanceIdentifier, cloud.region | STATS saturated = COUNT(*) WHERE f_cpu > 80| KEEP saturated

embeddableConfig.description: Databases reporting zero active connections in the selected time range.

attributes.description: Databases reporting zero active connections in the selected time range.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(DBInstanceIdentifier)) > 0 | WHERE stat == "Maximum" | STATS f_conn = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/DatabaseConnections`, NULL)) BY DBInstanceIdentifier, cloud.region | STATS idle = COUNT(*) WHERE f_conn == 0 OR f_conn IS NULL| KEEP idle

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(DBInstanceIdentifier)) > 0 | WHERE stat == "Maximum" | STATS f_conn = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/DatabaseConnections`, NULL)) BY DBInstanceIdentifier, cloud.region | STATS idle = COUNT(*) WHERE f_conn == 0 OR f_conn IS NULL| KEEP idle

embeddableConfig.description: Databases whose lowest observed Average `FreeStorageSpace` dropped below 5 GiB. Aurora instances have null FreeStorageSpace and are excluded.

attributes.description: Databases whose lowest observed Average `FreeStorageSpace` dropped below 5 GiB. Aurora instances have null FreeStorageSpace and are excluded.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(DBInstanceIdentifier)) > 0 | WHERE stat == "Average" | STATS f_storage = MIN(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeStorageSpace`, NULL)) BY DBInstanceIdentifier, cloud.region | STATS low_storage = COUNT(*) WHERE f_storage < 5368709120| KEEP low_storage

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(DBInstanceIdentifier)) > 0 | WHERE stat == "Average" | STATS f_storage = MIN(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeStorageSpace`, NULL)) BY DBInstanceIdentifier, cloud.region | STATS low_storage = COUNT(*) WHERE f_storage < 5368709120| KEEP low_storage

embeddableConfig.description: Databases with at least one active connection and peak CPU at most 80%.

attributes.description: Databases with at least one active connection and peak CPU at most 80%.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(DBInstanceIdentifier)) > 0 | WHERE stat == "Maximum" | STATS f_cpu = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization`, NULL)), f_conn = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/DatabaseConnections`, NULL)) BY DBInstanceIdentifier, cloud.region | STATS healthy = COUNT(*) WHERE f_conn > 0 AND (f_cpu <= 80 OR f_cpu IS NULL)| KEEP healthy

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(DBInstanceIdentifier)) > 0 | WHERE stat == "Maximum" | STATS f_cpu = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization`, NULL)), f_conn = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/DatabaseConnections`, NULL)) BY DBInstanceIdentifier, cloud.region | STATS healthy = COUNT(*) WHERE f_conn > 0 AND (f_cpu <= 80 OR f_cpu IS NULL)| KEEP healthy

embeddableConfig.title: Read IOPS (+) / Write IOPS (−)
embeddableConfig.description: Average peak read/write IOPS per database over time. Write series negated for visual contrast.

attributes.title: Read IOPS (+) / Write IOPS (−)
attributes.description: Average peak read/write IOPS per database over time. Write series negated for visual contrast.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(DBInstanceIdentifier)) > 0 AND LENGTH(TO_STRING(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/ReadIOPS`, NULL))) > 0 | WHERE stat == "Average" | STATS col_dr = AVG(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/ReadIOPS`, NULL)), col_dw = -AVG(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/WriteIOPS`, NULL)) BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), DBInstanceIdentifier, cloud.region | SORT timestamp ASC

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(DBInstanceIdentifier)) > 0 AND LENGTH(TO_STRING(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/ReadIOPS`, NULL))) > 0 | WHERE stat == "Average" | STATS col_dr = AVG(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/ReadIOPS`, NULL)), col_dw = -AVG(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/WriteIOPS`, NULL)) BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), DBInstanceIdentifier, cloud.region | SORT timestamp ASC

embeddableConfig.title: Network rx (+) / tx (−) MiB/s
embeddableConfig.description: Average network receive/transmit throughput per database, MiB/s. Tx series negated for visual contrast.

attributes.title: Network rx (+) / tx (−) MiB/s
attributes.description: Average network receive/transmit throughput per database, MiB/s. Tx series negated for visual contrast.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(DBInstanceIdentifier)) > 0 AND LENGTH(TO_STRING(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/NetworkReceiveThroughput`, NULL))) > 0 | WHERE stat == "Average" | STATS col_ni = AVG(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/NetworkReceiveThroughput`, NULL)) / 1048576.0, col_no = -AVG(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/NetworkTransmitThroughput`, NULL)) / 1048576.0 BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), DBInstanceIdentifier, cloud.region | SORT timestamp ASC

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(DBInstanceIdentifier)) > 0 AND LENGTH(TO_STRING(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/NetworkReceiveThroughput`, NULL))) > 0 | WHERE stat == "Average" | STATS col_ni = AVG(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/NetworkReceiveThroughput`, NULL)) / 1048576.0, col_no = -AVG(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/NetworkTransmitThroughput`, NULL)) / 1048576.0 BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), DBInstanceIdentifier, cloud.region | SORT timestamp ASC

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(DBInstanceIdentifier)) > 0 | WHERE stat == "Maximum" | STATS total_conn = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/DatabaseConnections`, NULL))

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(DBInstanceIdentifier)) > 0 | WHERE stat == "Maximum" | STATS total_conn = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/DatabaseConnections`, NULL))

embeddableConfig.description: Sum across all (non-Aurora) databases of each database's lowest observed Average `FreeStorageSpace`, formatted as bytes.

attributes.description: Sum across all (non-Aurora) databases of each database's lowest observed Average `FreeStorageSpace`, formatted as bytes.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(DBInstanceIdentifier)) > 0 | WHERE stat == "Average" | STATS f_storage = MIN(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeStorageSpace`, NULL)) BY DBInstanceIdentifier, cloud.region | STATS total_storage = SUM(f_storage)

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(DBInstanceIdentifier)) > 0 | WHERE stat == "Average" | STATS f_storage = MIN(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeStorageSpace`, NULL)) BY DBInstanceIdentifier, cloud.region | STATS total_storage = SUM(f_storage)

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(DBInstanceIdentifier)) > 0 | WHERE stat == "Maximum" | STATS peak_cpu = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization`, NULL)) / 100.0 BY DBInstanceIdentifier, cloud.region | SORT peak_cpu DESC | LIMIT 10

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(DBInstanceIdentifier)) > 0 | WHERE stat == "Maximum" | STATS peak_read_iops = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/ReadIOPS`, NULL)) BY DBInstanceIdentifier, cloud.region | SORT peak_read_iops DESC | LIMIT 10

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(DBInstanceIdentifier)) > 0 AND LENGTH(TO_STRING(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeableMemory`, NULL))) > 0 | WHERE stat == "Average" | STATS metric = AVG(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeableMemory`, NULL)) BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), DBInstanceIdentifier, cloud.region | SORT timestamp ASC

embeddableConfig.title: RDS databases — hexagon map (click an hex for actions)
embeddableConfig.description: One hexagon per RDS database, ordered worst-first with CPU-saturated or low-storage databases first. Toggle Color by between Status, CPU utilization, or Free Storage; metric views support Min, Max, Avg, and Last over the dashboard time range. Click any hexagon to filter the dashboard or open metrics for that database.

savedVis.title: RDS databases — hexagon map
savedVis.description: One hexagon per RDS database, ordered worst-first with CPU-saturated or low-storage databases first. Toggle Color by between Status, CPU utilization, or Free Storage; metric views support Min, Max, Avg, and Last over the dashboard time range. Click any hexagon to filter the dashboard or open metrics for that database.

params.spec:
{"$schema":"https://vega.github.io/schema/vega/v5.json","description":"One hexagon per RDS database, ordered worst-first with CPU-saturated or low-storage databases first. Toggle Color by between Status, CPU utilization, or Free Storage; metric views support Min, Max, Avg, and Last over the dashboard time range. Click any hexagon to filter the dashboard or open metrics for that database.","usermeta":{"x_rds_hexmap":true},"padding":{"top":10,"left":10,"right":10,"bottom":15},"data":[{"name":"ts_probe","url":{"%type%":"esql","%context%":true,"%timefield%":"@timestamp","query":"ROW round_key = CONCAT(TO_STRING(?_tstart), "|", TO_STRING(?_tend)), fetched_at = NOW()"}},{"name":"raw_all","url":{"%type%":"esql","%context%":true,"%timefield%":"@timestamp","query":"FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp <= ?_tend
 AND LENGTH(TO_STRING(DBInstanceIdentifier)) > 0 | WHERE stat IN ("Average", "Maximum") | STATS cpu_min = MIN(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization`, NULL))
 WHERE CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization`, NULL) IS NOT NULL,
 cpu_max = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization`, NULL))
 WHERE CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization`, NULL) IS NOT NULL,
 cpu_avg = AVG(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization`, NULL))
 WHERE CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization`, NULL) IS NOT NULL,
 cpu_last = LAST(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization`, NULL), @timestamp)
 WHERE CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization`, NULL) IS NOT NULL,
 st_min = MIN(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeStorageSpace`, NULL))
 WHERE CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeStorageSpace`, NULL) IS NOT NULL,
 st_max = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeStorageSpace`, NULL))
 WHERE CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeStorageSpace`, NULL) IS NOT NULL,
 st_avg = AVG(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeStorageSpace`, NULL))
 WHERE CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeStorageSpace`, NULL) IS NOT NULL,
 st_last = LAST(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeStorageSpace`, NULL), @timestamp)

 BY entity_id = DBInstanceIdentifier
, cloud.region | EVAL storage_min = st_min / 1073741824,
 storage_max = st_max / 1073741824,

 severity_rank = CASE(cpu_max > 80, 0, st_min < 5368709120, 1, conn_max == 0 OR conn_max IS NULL, 3, 2),
 round_key = CONCAT(TO_STRING(?_tstart), "|", TO_STRING(?_tend)),
 fetched_at = NOW()
| KEEP entity_id, status_num, status_label, severity_rank,
 cpu_min, cpu_max, cpu_avg, cpu_last,
 storage_min, storage_max, storage_avg, storage_last,
 round_key, fetched_at
